name: Ecomott Inc.
summary: Ecomott Inc. provides Internet of Things (IoT) and M2M solutions in Japan. It offers Yurimott, a snow-melting system remote supervision solution; Gembaroid, a computerized construction work support solution; FASTIO, an IoT platform solution; and Pdrive, a traffic accident avoidance solution. The company's solutions are used in network design and architecture, cloud application design and development, planning and proposal, system integration, device design and development, and assembly production industries. Ecomott Inc. was incorporated in 2007 and is based in Sapporo, Japan.
